description: L1 triage analyst — first-pass review and escalation.
Validates hypotheses, runs KQL, builds the timeline.
Summarises, drafts the case note, and writes back to Sentinel.
Designs and tunes analytic rules; consults the rule library.
Reviews patterns, proposes preamble + agent-instructions changes.
Outward-looking research — surfaces new CVEs, campaigns, IOCs relevant to the environment via Bing grounding.
